steps.name: Given backend teams are prepared (WeLikeCalls + IJoinCalls) with owners and members
And WeLikeCalls team owner creates GroupVideoCall conversation with team members
And participant devices and unique username are prepared for group call
And conference calling is enabled for WeLikeCalls and IJoinCalls via backend
And I see welcome screen before login
And I open staging deep link login flow
And I login as WeLikeCalls team owner
And I complete post-login permission and privacy prompts
And I verify GroupVideoCall conversation is visible and start new conversation flow
And I open people search to find TeamOwnerB
And I search TeamOwnerB by unique username
And I verify TeamOwnerB appears in search results and open profile
And I verify unconnected profile belongs to TeamOwnerB
And I send connection request to TeamOwnerB and verify confirmation toast
And I close unconnected profile and return to conversation list
And I verify pending status is visible for TeamOwnerB
And TeamOwnerB connection request is accepted via backend
And I verify pending status is removed and GroupVideoCall conversation remains visible
And I verify TeamOwnerB conversation is visible and open GroupVideoCall
And I open GroupVideoCall conversation details
And I open participants tab and start add participant flow
And I select TeamOwnerB from participant suggestions
And I verify TeamOwnerB is added to participants list
And I verify system message confirms TeamOwnerB was added
And <Member1>, <Member2>, and <TeamOwnerB> start instances using Chrome
And <Member1>, <Member2>, and <TeamOwnerB> auto-accept the next incoming call
When I start group call from GroupVideoCall conversation
Then <Member1>, <Member2>, and <TeamOwnerB> verify waiting instance status changes to active within 90 seconds
And I see ongoing group call
And I see users <Member1>, <Member2>, and <TeamOwnerB> in ongoing group call
And I turn camera on
And users <Member1>, <Member2>, and <TeamOwnerB> switch video on
And users <Member1>, <Member2>, and <TeamOwnerB> verify audio and video are received
And I see users <Member1>, <Member2>, and <TeamOwnerB> in ongoing group video call
And I minimise ongoing call to continue conversation actions
And I tap ping button in conversation view
And I see confirmation alert with text "Are you sure you want to ping 4 people?" in conversation view
And I confirm ping and see system message 'You pinged'
And I attempt to start audio recording during ongoing call
